items.title: Navy chief says Chinese flotilla in Tasman Sea had 'impact'

children.content: Australia's Chief of Navy says China stirred "anger" in New Zealand when it sent a powerful naval flotilla into the Tasman Sea last year, encouraging political support on both sides of the ditch for increased defence spending.

items.title: Iron ore processing project dumped by BHP for not being profitable enough

children.content: Internal BHP documents reveal how the mining giant planned to set up an iron ore processing facility in the Pilbara to cut carbon emissions before backing away from it entirely.

items.title: London hits record-breaking 35C as unusual May heatwave bakes Europe

children.content: The British capital's previous hottest May day was set only one day prior, when the mercury topped 33.5C.

children.content: A Japanese mayor will take maternity leave this year, becoming the first in the country's history to do so while in office.

items.title: Bondi gunman remained on counter-terror radar in 2022

articles.title: Why Trump's push to expand his Abraham Accords was met with silence

items.title: Archibald Prize sitter calls out APY art collective mistreatment

children.content: Award-winning artist Iluwanti Ken says the withdrawal of funding and support over the "white hands on black art" scandal has left her feeling like a stranger in her own industry.

items.title: Hypersonic missile attack a sign of Putin's 'bruised ego', expert says

children.content: Russia escalates attacks on Kyiv by using a hypersonic missile in one of its largest assaults on the Ukrainian capital since the start of the four-year war, and warns foreigners to leave the city ahead of further strikes.

items.title: Romanian man jailed for stealing from elderly Australian shoppers

items.title: The many phases of Miles Davis, who would have turned 100 today

items.title: After losing her 3yo daughter, one mum says MDMA therapy saved her life

items.title: Teary council officer tells ICAC they 'should be ashamed of yourselves'

items.title: Kumanjayi White family 'heartbroken' no charges laid over custody death

image.altText: A group of Aboriginal mourners walking through a coles supermarket, while holding branches.

items.title: Man discovers Stolen Generations truth after decades believing he was adopted

children.content: Ricky Hampson spent most of his life believing he had been adopted before learning several years ago he is a survivor of the Stolen Generations. Today, he is calling for more action and truth-telling.

items.title: Power price drops for most customers as batteries flatten peak

children.content: Surging levels of renewable energy and better reliability from coal-fired generators are set to give consumers a break, with benchmark power prices to fall up to 10 per cent for consumers and more for small businesses.

items.title: Flights resume at training school after two killed in plane crash

children.content: An aviation school resumes flight operations at Adelaide's Parafield Airport four weeks after an instructor and a student onboard a twin-engine plane were killed when it crashed into a hangar.

items.title: Israeli politician calls for investigation into Netanyahu minister after Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse

image.altText: Yair Lapid speaks at a lectern gesturing with one hand.

items.title: 'Catastrophic failure' after drones malfunction at Vivid Sydney show

items.title: Late pastoralist's family loses appeal over judgement that father was responsible for bushfire

children.content: A court judgement that found pastoralist Tom Brinkworth liable for a 2021 bushfire, five months after he died, has been upheld after an appeal by Mr Brinkworth's family.

items.title: Interim AVOs issued to keep developer away from council mayor and GM

items.title: Can State of Origin save an NRL season that's losing its way?

children.content: Players, coaches and fans are disillusioned with the rule changes that have come to define this NRL season but ahead of Origin I can the interstate series put a broken season back together?
